title: Writing a Case Study
scenario: A marketing team needs to write a case study on a successful campaign they ran. The case study should include an overview of the campaign, its goals, and its results. The team wants to use the case study to showcase their expertise and persuade potential clients.
constraints: Must include a clear executive summary
Must highlight the team's expertise and value proposition

evaluationCriteria.description: The executive summary is clear and concise.
The team's expertise and value proposition are clearly highlighted.
The language used is persuasive and effective in showcasing the team's expertise.
